item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.1.0

Security

  • Removed authentication token from app bundle
  • Moved update distribution to public release channel
  • Removed explicit sandbox opt-out from entitlements

Bundle Identity

  • Updated bundle identifier to proper reverse-DNS format
  • Automatic migration of Keychain items, UserDefaults, and login items from previous versions

Menu Bar App

  • Shout now runs as a menu-bar-only app by default
  • Launch at login now uses modern macOS login items (System Settings > Login Items)

Automation

  • New shout:// URL scheme — control Shout from Terminal, scripts, or other apps
  • App Intents for Shortcuts — start/stop recording and check status from Shortcuts.app or Siri

Clipboard

  • Transcription paste now preserves your clipboard — original contents are restored after pasting

Compatibility

  • Now supports macOS 14 Sonoma and later

item.title: Version 1.0.9
item.description:
What's New in 1.0.9

Smarter Audio Device Recovery

  • Smart device fallback with priority ordering — saved device, system default, built-in mic, then other devices
  • Detects Bluetooth disconnections that don't change the default device
  • Device health checks prevent fallback to unhealthy devices
  • Recovery now escalates instead of giving up after 3 attempts
  • CoreAudio negotiation moved off main thread to prevent UI freezes

Onboarding & Licensing

  • Language selection and model download steps in onboarding
  • Paywall view with trial badge
  • Privacy toggle switches consistently aligned

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed audio engine -10877 errors on device switch
  • Fixed Swift concurrency warnings and deprecated API usage
  • UI improvements to menu bar, notification cards, and settings
